event: Oakland Roots SC announced it will not return to the Oakland Coliseum for the 2027 season, with no confirmed replacement venue secured.
Club confirmed pursuit of an Exclusive Negotiating Agreement with the Port of Oakland for a permanent stadium at the Howard Terminal site.
Head Coach Matt Poland departed and Zak Gordon was appointed interim head coach for the remainder of the 2026 USL League One season.
Detroit City FC earned a road victory at Fort Wayne FC, snapping the club's recent momentum mid-season.
Fort Wayne FC secured a multiyear naming rights deal with Ruoff Mortgage, officially naming their new 9,280-seat stadium Ruoff Mortgage Stadium.
Fort Wayne FC recorded a 3-0 victory on Independence Day at Ruoff Mortgage Stadium, featuring a record-setting goal from Taig Healy.
Union Omaha hold first place in the USL League One table, one point ahead of One Knoxville SC with 42% of the season completed.
One Knoxville SC moved closer to a USL League One record for road undefeated streak, sitting one point behind table-leaders Union Omaha.
Charlotte Independence's eight-match winning streak came to an end in USL League One competition.
Ballard FC defeated Snohomish United 4-0 in the regular-season finale to claim their fourth consecutive Northwest Division title, finishing 12-1-1.
Snohomish United fell 4-0 to Ballard FC in the regular-season finale, missing out on the Northwest Division title but still qualifying for the USL2 Playoffs at 11-2-1.
Ballard FC announced a privately-funded stadium expansion adding 267 seats at Interbay Stadium, with a second phase planned for 2027 that would add covered seating.

Lionsbridge FC finished the USL League Two regular season in the Chesapeake Division with 34 points and a +32 goal differential, earning home hosting rights for the Eastern Conference Quarterfinals on July 17.
Defending champion Vermont Green FC qualified for the 2026 USL League Two Playoffs and will host the Eastern Conference Quarterfinals on July 17 at Virtue Field, Burlington.
Fort Lauderdale United FC face Swarm FC in a USL League Two Playoff Conference Quarterfinal at Rip Hewes Stadium, Dothan, AL.
North Carolina FC announced it would suspend operations and go on hiatus after the 2025 USL Championship season, with the goal of entering USL Premier in 2028 with a new stadium in Raleigh.
Lexington SC hosted New Mexico United in a USL Championship regular-season fixture at Lexington SC Stadium (7:00 PM ET, July 15).
Sporting Club Jacksonville hosted defending champion Pittsburgh Riverhounds SC at Hodges Stadium (7:30 PM ET, July 15).
Pittsburgh Riverhounds SC traveled to Sporting Club Jacksonville for a midweek USL Championship fixture (7:30 PM ET, July 15).
